title: Nursery Rhyme. XXXI. Literal
content:
A, B, C, tumble down D,
        The cat's in the cupboard and can't see me.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. XXXI. Literal" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
